ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., main, branch) */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "length_km" TEXT /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the route (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the line belongs to */,
  "line_code" TEXT /* Code for the line (e.g., LN860, LN861) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector the line belongs to */,
  "line_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of line */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., single, double) */,
  "speed_limit_kmph" INTEGER /* Speed limit for the line in kilometers per hour */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the line (e.g., operational, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lines_line_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_type_id") REFERENCES line_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lines_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the sector */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the sector */,
  "length_km" TEXT /* Length of the sector in kilometers */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sector (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the line type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line type */,
  "max_speed_kmph" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit for the line type */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., single, double) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_data" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the page data belongs to */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number for the line */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the page */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., technical, operational) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the page was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_sector_data" (
  "line_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line sector data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the line sector data belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the line sector data belongs to */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the line sector */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the line sector data was recorded */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the line sector data was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the line sector data (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_sector_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_sector_data_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, administrator, maintenance personnel) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the line */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the line was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the historical data belongs to */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical data */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., diversion, closure) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_history_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the historical data belongs to */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical data */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., closure, reopening) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_history_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_history_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the historical data belongs to */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical data was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical data */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., closure, reopening) */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user responsible for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_history_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_history_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elr_data" (
  "elr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ELR data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the ELR data belongs to */,
  "elr_code" TEXT /* ELR code for the line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ELR data */,
  "start_km" TEXT /* Start kilometer marker */,
  "end_km" TEXT /* End kilometer marker */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the ELR data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elr_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mdl_data" (
  "mdl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MDL data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the MDL data belongs to */,
  "mdl_code" TEXT /* MDL code for the line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MDL data */,
  "start_km" TEXT /* Start kilometer marker */,
  "end_km" TEXT /* End kilometer marker */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the MDL data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mdl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mdl_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bbw_data" (
  "bbw_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BBW data entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line the BBW data belongs to */,
  "bbw_code" TEXT /* BBW code for the line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BBW data */,
  "start_km" TEXT /* Start kilometer marker */,
  "end_km" TEXT /* End kilometer marker */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the BBW data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bbw_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bbw_data_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id")
)
